hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.py$' || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; uv run ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null; base=$(basename "$f" .py); if [ "$base" != "__init__" ] && [ "$base" != "conftest" ]; then uv run pytest -x -q --tb=line -k "$base" -m "not integration" 2>/dev/null | tail -5; fi; echo "$f" | grep -q '^src/' && uv run mypy --no-error-summary "$f" 2>&1 | tail -5; exit 0; }

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); import os; name=os.path.basename(p); sys.exit(2 if (name=='.env' or p.endswith('/.env') or '.git/' in p or 'credentials' in name) else 0)"
python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if 'alembic/versions/' in p else 0)"

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q -- '--autogenerate'; then grep -q 'include_name' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/alembic/env.py" 2>/dev/null || { echo 'BLOCKED: include_name schema filter missing from alembic/env.py. Autogenerate without it will corrupt Supabase-managed schemas (auth, storage, realtime). See failure-patterns.md PF-3.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'alembic\s+downgrade'; then echo 'BLOCKED: alembic downgrade is destructive and may cause data loss on Supabase. Use alembic upgrade with a new migration to revert changes instead. Override with explicit user confirmation.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0; }
osascript -e 'display notification "Awaiting input" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true

bash -c 'H=$(printf "%s" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" | md5 2>/dev/null || printf "%s" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" | md5sum 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-8 || echo compgraph); RF=/tmp/claude-stop-${H}; C=$(cat "$RF" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$C" -ge 3 ]; then rm -f "$RF"; echo "CIRCUIT_BREAKER: Max retries (3) reached, allowing stop." >&2; exit 0; fi; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f "$RF"; exit 0; }; DIRTY=$(git diff --name-only origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep "\.py$" | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$DIRTY" -gt 0 ]; then echo "STOP_CHECK[$((C+1))/3]: $DIRTY Python file(s) changed vs origin/HEAD. Consider committing before ending." >&2; echo $((C+1)) > "$RF"; exit 2; fi; rm -f "$RF"; exit 0;'
